title: Group by Multiple Fields in Gantt View
excerpt:
I would like to have the ability to group tasks/items by more than one field in the Gantt view. This feature would provide a more detailed and organized view of tasks, enhancing project management efficiency. 
Even just …

posts.author: ThomasWright (Thomas Wright)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have the ability to group tasks/items by more than one field in the Gantt view. This feature would provide a more detailed and organized view of tasks, enhancing project management efficiency.

Even just having the ability to add only a second group, would be super beneficial.

posts.author: jricco (Jolie Ricco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed! Because we want to Group by 1. Group and 2. Scrum Team. Since both are at the item level we can’t we have to pick and choose. And for those who might be asking, why not just use the color by there, we want to color by Status.
The use case is we help leverage the gantt view for roadmapping.

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Having to pick between grouping and coloring feels so limiting when you’re trying to get a full picture of a project. Multiple groupings would make the Gantt view way more powerful for real-world workflows like road mapping!
